items.title: 3 Reasons Why This 4%-Yielding Dividend King Is the Ultimate Passive Income Powerhouse to Buy Now
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: PepsiCo is a diversified food and beverage company facing near-term challenges, but its low valuation, high dividend yield, and long-term growth potential make it an attractive investment opportunity for patient investors.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights PepsiCo's diversification, long-term growth potential, and attractive valuation and dividend yield, making it a compelling investment opportunity despite near-term challenges.
The article mentions PepsiCo's distribution agreement and minority stake in Celsius Holdings, but does not provide a clear sentiment on the company.
The article compares PepsiCo's diversification to Coca-Cola's focus on non-alcoholic beverages, but does not provide a clear sentiment on Coca-Cola.
The article compares PepsiCo's dividend yield to that of Procter & Gamble, but does not provide a clear sentiment on Procter & Gamble.
